task: multica-agent-plugin v0.7.0 deep Multica integration + reliability

stories.title: metadata deep integration: read/write at key lifecycle points
acceptanceCriteria: skills/core/hitl-protocol.md instructs agent to write blocked_reason metadata on HITL blocked: multica issue metadata set <id> --key blocked_reason --value '[HITL:question_id=<uuid>] <question>'
skills/core/hitl-protocol.md instructs agent to read blocked_reason from metadata in discover phase to resume context
skills/core/multica-workflow.md Phase 1 (discover) instructs agent to read metadata first: multica issue metadata list <id> --output json
skills/core/multica-workflow.md Phase 5 (report) instructs agent to clear blocked_reason metadata on successful completion
hooks/session-start.sh reads .multica/state/<issue_id>/cached-metadata.json if present and injects as '## Issue Metadata' context
stop.sh DONE path writes loop iteration to metadata: multica issue metadata set <id> --key loop_progress --value 'complete:iteration=N'
All new multica CLI calls use <<cli:*>> anchors in skill files

stories.title: autopilot context awareness in session-start + skills
acceptanceCriteria: hooks/session-start.sh detects MULTICA_AUTOPILOT_RUN_ID env var (set by daemon for autopilot sessions)
When autopilot run detected: session-start injects '## Autopilot Mode' context: no issue comment, no issue status, stdout is result
skills/core/multica-workflow.md has a note: 'In autopilot run-only mode (MULTICA_AUTOPILOT_RUN_ID set), skip issue comment/status calls; output result to stdout only'
stop.sh detects autopilot mode (no MULTICA_ISSUE_ID, MULTICA_AUTOPILOT_RUN_ID set) and skips loop.json check, checkpoint comments, git commit — exits 0 cleanly
bash -n hooks/session-start.sh passes
bash -n hooks/stop.sh passes

stories.title: squad leader capacity probe in squad-leader-workflow.md
acceptanceCriteria: skills/core/squad-leader-workflow.md capacity edge case section instructs leader to check member load before Strategy A delegation
Instruction: run 'multica issue list --assignee-id <member-uuid> --status in_progress --output json' and count results
If count >= $MULTICA_LOOP_MAX_ITERATIONS (default 6 per agent): pick different member or use Strategy B (@mention serial)
If all members at capacity: post [HITL:human] asking operator to increase capacity or wait
Decision matrix updated to include capacity check as first step

stories.title: blocked restart protection in session-start.sh
acceptanceCriteria: hooks/session-start.sh checks: if MULTICA_ISSUE_ID set AND .multica/state/<id>/hitl-bounces.json exists with unanswered HITL (last_at within MULTICA_HITL_TIMEOUT_HOURS)

When unanswered HITL detected: prepend strong warning to context_parts: '[HITL:pending] question_id=<uuid> — this issue is blocked waiting for human reply. Do NOT proceed with new work. Check issue comments for the human reply first.'
If no human reply found in metadata/comments: agent should re-post the HITL question and set blocked again
bash -n hooks/session-start.sh passes

stories.title: tools/loop-status.sh: human-readable task progress
acceptanceCriteria: tools/loop-status.sh exists and is executable
Script reads .multica/state/<MULTICA_ISSUE_ID>/loop.json and prints: issue ID, iteration/max, phase, story completion (N/total with checkmarks), HITL pending status, last checkpoint time
When no loop.json: prints 'No active loop for issue <id>'
When MULTICA_ISSUE_ID not set: prints usage and lists available issue state dirs
bash -n tools/loop-status.sh passes
shellcheck tools/loop-status.sh no errors

stories.title: docs: cli-reference.md new anchors + CHANGELOG + VERSION
acceptanceCriteria: docs/cli-reference.md contains <<cli:issue.metadata.list>>, <<cli:issue.metadata.set>>, <<cli:issue.metadata.delete>> anchors
docs/cli-reference.md contains <<cli:autopilot.get>> anchor
docs/cli-reference.lock updated to match
VERSION contains 0.7.0
CHANGELOG.md contains [0.7.0] entry

stories.title: smoke: all 50+ tests pass
acceptanceCriteria: bash tests/smoke/run-claude.sh exits 0 with FAIL: 0
